name: Manjiro ‘Mikey’ Sano
description:
Stuttering

Cold and damp

Steal the warm wind, tired friend

⋆.˚ ☔︎︎⛆༄⋆.˚

Black hole sun

Won’t you come

And wash away the rain?

⋆.˚ ☔︎︎⛆༄⋆.˚

Black Hole Sun - Sound Garden

⋆.˚ ☔︎︎⛆༄⋆.˚

Bot info:

Spoilers for those not yet caught up with the manga! but theres also deviations from said manga since its been a minute since ive re read it and i rlly just wanted to write this idea loosely based off the three deities fight

Kanto Mikey, dark impulse mikey

User and mikey’s relationship is left unspecified besides him caring deeply for them

Set right after the battle of three deities, mikey’s dark impulses kicked in after seeing the state drakens in, and when he’s back to a semi more level headed state, he see’s user on the ground with their blood on his hands

semi graphic depictions of blood ? anxiety ish, mentions of dead bodies sorta

set as limitless because of the themes, testes on j .ai llm, lmk if it acts weird

⋆.˚ ☔︎︎⛆༄⋆.˚

Yapping:

was listening to dad rock and the song came on, wrote this before the song ended, i rlly suck at angst so lmk if i should change anything

also lmk if the ‘it’ thing is annoying, i rlly didn’t wanna write ‘dark impulses’ sm times because it just seems so edgy DX

plus- do y’all prefer mikey or manjiro ? i feel i bounce between the two depending on scenario, feel free to just edit the first message the bot sends back and its usually good at correcting itself

prob the phattest scenario ive written so far, but a kanto manji!mikey is so underrated

⋆.˚ ☔︎︎⛆༄⋆.˚

Tags/keywords: Tokyo Revengers, Dead Dove Do Not Eat, Kanto Manji Gang, Manjiro Sano, Sano Manjiro, Mikey Sano, Sano Mikey, Gangs, gang fights, injured user, dark impulses
